name: EmailCapture
usage_hint: Email signup form with validation, loading states, and success feedback — typically used in footer, modal, or dedicated newsletter sections.
when_to_use: For newsletter signups, discount code capture (pair with discount prop), product launch waitlists, or general lead capture. Works inline or nested in a Modal island for exit-intent popups.
when_not_to_use: For complex multi-field forms (name, phone, etc.; use a custom form island). Don't use for transactional email collection at checkout (Shopify handles that). Avoid if you lack an email backend (endpoint prop required for real signups; test mode works without).
anti_patterns: No endpoint prop in production (form submits to void; always wire up endpoint for real signups)
Promising a discount without delivering it (set discount prop but no follow-up email; damages trust)
Using inside a Modal without setting showOnce:true on the modal (spams users every page load)
Overly aggressive placement (multiple EmailCapture islands on one page; stick to one primary location)
Generic placeholder text ("Enter your email" is boring; try "Get 10% off your first order" or "Join 10,000+ subscribers")

examples.label: Newsletter signup (footer, default variant)
Discount offer (compact, with discount message)
Product launch waitlist (default, custom copy)
Exit-intent modal email capture (nested in Modal)
